name: Panoramic Dental X-Ray
description: Panoramic radiograph for comprehensive dental evaluation

findings.technique: A panoramic radiograph (orthopantomogram) was obtained for dental evaluation.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Maxillary Teeth
sections.content: The maxillary teeth from right to left demonstrate [no caries / no periapical pathology / no missing teeth / no impactions]. The roots are [intact / no root resorption].

sections.name: Mandibular Teeth
sections.content: The mandibular teeth from right to left demonstrate [no caries / no periapical pathology / no missing teeth / no impactions]. The roots are [intact / no root resorption].

sections.name: Maxillary Sinus
sections.content: The bilateral maxillary sinuses are [clear / no sinus opacity / no mucosal thickening / no cyst].

sections.name: Mandibular Canal
sections.content: The mandibular canal is [patent / no erosion / no pathology]. The inferior alveolar nerve is [not involved].

sections.name: Temporomandibular Joints
sections.content: The bilateral temporomandibular joints demonstrate [no degenerative changes / no joint space narrowing / no abnormality].

sections.name: Bony Structures
sections.content: The maxilla and mandible demonstrate [no bony lesions / no cystic changes / no tumors]. The cortical margins are [intact].

sections.name: Soft Tissues
sections.content: The soft tissues of the face and neck are [unremarkable / no calcifications / no abnormal soft tissue masses].

impression:
1. Normal panoramic dental radiograph.
2. No dental pathology, impaction, or bony abnormality identified.
author: RadReport Templates
